data.title: IZA partners with Pharmanova to provide zinc treatments for children in Zambia, collaboration celebrated in Lusaka.
data.description: In Lusaka, Zambia, Zinc Saves Kids, a child-health initiative by the International Zinc Association, has partnered with Pharmanova Zambia Limited, a top pharmaceutical manufacturer in the country, to increase availability of vital zinc treatments for children in Zambia. The official partnership was marked at an event in Lusaka attended by the Zambian Ministry of Health, Pharmanova Zambia Limited, and IZA. This alliance aims to improve access to life-saving zinc treatments for children in Zambia, furthering the efforts to enhance child health in the region.

data.title: Plaid names Shawn Babcock COO on Jan 20, 2026. Firm is Plaid Technologies Inc. (CSE: STIF), (OTC: STIFF), (FRA: 5QX0).
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 21, 2026, Plaid Technologies Inc. (CSE: STIF) (OTC: STIFF) (FRA: 5QX0) revealed the appointment of Shawn Babcock as the new Chief Operating Officer, starting from January 20, 2026.

data.title: ESA member states are providing €73 million ($84.8 million) to SWISSto12 for HummingSat project to meet demand for communications satellites.
data.description: In Renens, Switzerland, SWISSto12 has reported receiving a substantial €73 million ($84.8 million) in funding from ESA member states as part of the HummingSat ARTES partnership project.

data.title: Ageneau Group selects Generix WMS to enhance expansion, improve efficiency. #logistics #supplychain #technology
data.description: Yesterday, it was reported that the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average falling by over 500 points. The S&P 500 also saw a decrease of around 2%. This downturn was attributed to concerns about inflation and rising interest rates. Tech stocks were particularly hard hit, with the NASDAQ dropping by more than 3%. Investors are keeping a close eye on these developments as they continue to assess the market situation and its potential impact on their portfolios.

data.title: Netmarble marks Raven2's 100th day with in-game events, rewarding players with Heroic Holy Garment, Familiar, Heavenstone.
data.description: A recent update for a popular dark fantasy MMORPG by renowned game developer Netmarble based in Seoul, South Korea, introduces in-game events with lucrative rewards. Players can now obtain the Heroic Holy Garment, Heroic Familiar, and the rare Heavenstone through these events. The update, released on Jan. 21, 2026, aims to enhance the gaming experience and attract more players to the platform.

data.title: Infinitopes raises $35M to accelerate cancer vaccine development, prepares for first clinical trial.
data.description: A company, with financial support from Octopus Ventures and a new investor Amplify Bio, is preparing for its initial human trial of ITOP1, a precise cancer vaccine intended to deter recurrence in oesophageal cancer. The company, Infinitopes, based in Oxford, England, announced this significant development on January 21, 2026. This groundbreaking milestone marks a crucial step forward in the field of cancer treatment and signifies the potential impact of ITOP1 in revolutionizing cancer care.

data.title: 'All Access with Andy Garcia' highlights ethical surrogacy with Simple Surrogacy LLC. Collaboration announced in Los Angeles on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: In an upcoming segment airing in Los Angeles on January 21, 2026, the show 'All Access with Andy Garcia' will explore the fusion of reproductive technology and the individual effort needed to establish contemporary families. The program will partner with Simple Surrogacy, LLC to delve into this topic.

data.title: Hankook to provide high-performance rally tires for 2026 FIA World Rally Championship at Rallye Monte-Carlo from Jan 22-25.
data.description: Starting on January 22nd and running through January 25th, the 2026 FIA World Rally Championship kicks off with Rallye Monte-Carlo in Monaco and France. Hankook's top-tier rally tires are poised to make a significant impact during the challenging competition, which will encompass various terrains including mountain roads, snow, and ice. This opening event marks the commencement of the season, blending thrilling racing action with scenic routes across the two countries.

data.title: LeapSpace, a new AI-assisted workspace, launches with 18+ million research articles included. Leading publishers and societies join.
data.description: A significant number of prominent publishers and societies have partnered with LeapSpace during its launch. The platform already encompasses over 18 million full-text research articles and books. The debut of LeapSpace, Elsevier's advanced workspace integrated with artificial intelligence, took place on January 21, 2026, marking its availability to customers. data.title: Global innovator rankings released by Clarivate show top 100 organizations leading in AI inventions; accounting for 16% worldwide.
data.description: Today, Clarivate Plc revealed in London that the Top 100 organizations are at the forefront of innovation, responsible for a remarkable 16% of the world's most cutting-edge AI inventions. This marks the 15th edition of the report, showcasing the significant impact these organizations have on technological advancements worldwide.

data.title: GAKO Technologies launches VIN-level intelligence platform for automotive industry after two-year development; offers real-time data on pricing, incentives, and inventory.
data.description: GAKO Technologies, based in Oxnard, California, has emerged from stealth mode and introduced a VIN-level intelligence platform dedicated to the automotive sector. After a two-year development phase, this new platform offers in-depth insights for new vehicles at the enterprise level. It provides immediate access to real-time data on pricing, incentives, payments, vehicle specifications, and inventory on a per-vehicle basis. Furthermore, GAKO's platform delivers structured datasets optimized for machine learning applications to support AI projects. This significant launch is poised to revolutionize automotive industry decision-making processes by providing unparalleled access to crucial information.

data.title: Tsinghua University scientists studying the importance and challenges of water in human civilization.
data.description: In a recent update from Beijing on January 21, 2026, it was mentioned that human civilization has historically flourished alongside water, holding both vitality and difficulties. At Tsinghua University, significant research endeavors are underway with teams of scientists leading the way. This innovative initiative aims to address long-standing challenges related to water and its impact on life. The project signifies a groundbreaking effort in which experts are dedicated to exploring solutions, demonstrating a commitment to understanding and managing water-related issues effectively.

data.title: TUM University Hospital in Germany adds pathology and ophthalmology modules to Sectra imaging solution for improved diagnostics and patient care.
data.description: In Sweden on January 21, 2026, the TUM Klinikum Rechts der Isar in Germany has decided to enhance its enterprise imaging solution provided by Sectra. The hospital has invested in additional modules for pathology from the multinational medical imaging IT and cybersecurity corporation. The company, traded as STO: SECT B, is recognized globally for offering advanced solutions in healthcare technology. This initiative reflects TUM Klinikum's commitment to enhancing its medical imaging services for improved patient care.
